description: Compare failover performance across all routing combinations

targets.rawSql: SELECT combination_id AS "Combination", avg_downtime_ms AS "Avg Downtime (ms)", min_downtime_ms AS "Min (ms)", max_downtime_ms AS "Max (ms)" FROM combination_comparison WHERE dcs = '$dcs' AND provider = '$provider' AND failover_type = '$failover_type' ORDER BY avg_downtime_ms

panels.title: Downtime Distribution (Box Plot)
panels.description: Spread of downtime across multiple test runs per combination

targets.rawSql: SELECT combination_id AS "Combination", avg_downtime_ms AS "Avg (ms)", stddev_downtime_ms AS "StdDev (ms)", min_downtime_ms AS "Min (ms)", max_downtime_ms AS "Max (ms)", test_runs AS "Runs" FROM combination_comparison WHERE dcs = '$dcs' AND provider = '$provider' AND failover_type = '$failover_type' ORDER BY avg_downtime_ms

SELECT combination_id AS "Combination", avg_failed_queries AS "Avg Failed Queries" FROM combination_comparison WHERE dcs = '$dcs' AND provider = '$provider' AND failover_type = '$failover_type' ORDER BY avg_failed_queries

SELECT fw.combination_id AS "Combination", fw.test_run_id AS "Test Run", fw.downtime_ms AS "Downtime (ms)", fw.total_failures AS "Failed", fw.total_successes AS "Success", tr.failover_type AS "Failover Type", tr.provider AS "Provider" FROM failover_window fw JOIN test_runs tr ON tr.id = fw.test_run_id WHERE tr.dcs = '$dcs' ORDER BY fw.combination_id, tr.started_at DESC

list.name: dcs
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT dcs FROM test_runs ORDER BY dcs

list.name: provider
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT provider FROM test_runs WHERE dcs = '$dcs' ORDER BY provider

list.name: failover_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT failover_type FROM test_runs WHERE dcs = '$dcs' AND provider = '$provider' ORDER BY failover_type

title: Combination Comparison
